ohtani.title: Eric Lauer's six hitless innings lead Dodgers to win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman and Shohei Ohtani each homer and Eric Lauer tosses six hitless relief innings to lead the Dodgers to a win over the Twins

imanaga.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's cycle highlights walk-off win
imanaga.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits MLB's first cycle of 2026 and Matt Shaw walks it off in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Rockies

suzuki.title: Kazuma Okamoto hits go-ahead homer in Blue Jays' win
suzuki.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits a clutch three-run home run and Daulton Varsho collects three RBIs in the Blue Jays' 8-6 comeback win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Jake McCarthy walks it off in Rockies' 3-2 win
yoshida.blurb: Jake McCarthy leads the Rockies to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox with a walk-off triple

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto hits a home run in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits a home run and Dylan Cease strikes out eight in the Blue Jays' 4-2 victory over the Astros

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Wyatt Langford hits a three-run homer in Rangers' win
matsui.blurb: Wyatt Langford's hits a three-run home run and Nathan Eovaldi strikes out nine in the Rangers' 4-3 win over the Padres
